creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Hi Wen,

wen heping wrote on 09.06.2012 12:26:
> 2012/6/9 Ruslan Mahmatkhanov<cvs-src@yandex.ru>
>
>> The following reply was made to PR ports/168857; it has been noted by
>> GNATS.
>>
>> From: Ruslan Mahmatkhanov<cvs-src@yandex.ru>
>> To: Martin Wilke<miwi@FreeBSD.org>
>> Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
>> Subject: Re: ports/168857: [PATCH] sysutils/py27-zdaemon: update to 2.0.6
>> Date: Sat, 09 Jun 2012 10:41:54 +0400
>>
>>   Martin please note, that:
>>
>>   a) this port is maintained by Wen
>>   b) there is version 2.0.7 that fixing critical bug in 2.0.6
>>   c) it need to be checked if www/zope213 can be started with this
>>      version of zdaemon (I'll do this at evening and will report back)
>>
>
> Hi,
>
>     I reset maintainer to zope@ for better maintain.
>    And version 3.0.1 released.

Yes, I see. But I'm sure it will not work :) So it's better to stick 
with 2.0.x now.

>
> to submitter:
>    the ports name should be sysutils/py-zdaemon but
> not sysutils/py27-zdaemon :)
>
> Regards,
> wen


-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
